title: calathea pavonina
intro: Calathea pavonina, also known as the Peacock Calathea or Calathea Peacock, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae. It is a beautiful and striking plant with purple underside of its leaves, giving it a vibrant appearance. The leaves of the Calathea pavonina plant have been used in traditional medicine, particularly in South American folk medicine, for their medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress and anxiety, promote better sleep, and boost the immune system, and it can be prepared in herbal teas and infusions.
